response.justification: Strong candidate with 19 years of full-stack experience, currently performing this exact role at re:cinq. Demonstrates mastery of the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, AWS, Docker), proven testing and TDD practices, and active AI-agent infrastructure work. Minor gaps in explicitly documented Nest.js, specific test frameworks, and PostgreSQL experience, but core competencies far exceed requirements. CS degree with strong problem-solving and communication demonstrated through open-source projects and community contributions.
